name: OpenClaw Order Runtime Guard
description: Plugin-first install unit for the local-first order system with explicit agent binding and hard execution rules.

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.help: Enable the order runtime guard plugin.

pythonBin.label: Python Binary
pythonBin.help: Python executable used for the bundled order runtime scripts.

dataRoot.label: Order Data Root
dataRoot.help: Override the local-first order data root. Defaults to ~/Documents/openclaw-order.

agentIds.label: Order Agent IDs
agentIds.help: Exact agent IDs that should enter the order runtime guard.

injectRoleContract.label: Inject Role Contract
injectRoleContract.help: Inject order runtime guidance into matching agent sessions.
